scripts.build:css: sass scss/style.scss style.css --style=expanded --no-source-map --silence-deprecation=import,global-builtin,if-function,color-functions && sass scss/editor-style.scss editor-style.css --style=expanded --no-source-map --silence-deprecation=import,global-builtin,if-function,color-functions && sass inc/assets/scss/mynote-alpha-color-picker.scss inc/assets/css/mynote-alpha-color-picker.css --style=expanded --no-source-map && sass inc/assets/scss/mynote-image-radio.scss inc/assets/css/mynote-image-radio.css --style=expanded --no-source-map && sass inc/assets/scss/mynote-toggle.scss inc/assets/css/mynote-toggle.css --style=expanded --no-source-map
